article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: The summary is more neutral than the source but occasionally adopts the article’s framing as fact. It introduces generalizations like “widespread support” and “a united desire” among Iranians without attribution, uses terms like “hardline regime,” and states regime “repression and violence” in the model’s voice. Most emotionally charged language is toned down or attributed, but some evaluative claims persist unhedged.

custom_reasoning.spin: Mostly neutral verbs; slight evaluative tone in phrases like “hardline regime” and “heartfelt.”
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Presents “widespread support” and “a united desire” among Iranians as fact without clear attribution.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Treats the regime’s “repression and violence” and breadth of public support as settled in narrator’s voice instead of clearly attributing to the letter-writer.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Avoids extreme rhetoric from the source; no amplification of dramatic language.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No insults or personal attacks in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer mental states; some broad generalizations about public desire approach assumption but not explicit mind-reading.
custom_reasoning.slant: Article is one-sided; summary reflects that but does not unduly amplify beyond source.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures main viewpoints in the piece; no major perspective present in the article is omitted.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Uses subjective descriptors like “heartfelt,” “hardline,” and “brutal and unyielding” (partly attributed).
custom_reasoning.word_choice: “Regime” and similar charged terms used; generally aligned with source tone.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone mirrors the article; not excessively more negative than source.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Centers a citizen’s account without privileging elites.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than source but retains some loaded framing and unhedged generalizations.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Primarily one perspective; summary reflects it. “Sources_represented” includes outlets as perspectives, which is imprecise but not omissive.
